# Web Install

Web platform documentation including JavaScript library setup, tag management integrations, and server-side SDKs.

## About markdown versions

All pages in this area are available in clean markdown format. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/`
- Markdown: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/index.md`


## Platforms


- [Tealium Shopify App: About Tealium Shopify app](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/shopify/about/): This article provides information about the Tealium application in the Shopify Marketplace.

- [API Reference: Cookie Functions](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/api/cookie-functions/): Reference guide for cookie functions provided by Tealium for JavaScript.

- [Tealium for Salesforce: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/salesforce/install/): This article explains how to install and configure the Tealium for Salesforce using Apex classes and triggers to track Lead and Contact updates with Tealium Collect.

- [Data Layer: An Introduction to the Data Layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/an-introduction-to-the-data-layer/): This article introduces the data layer and explains what it is, how it works, and the benefits of implementing one.

- [API Reference: GDPR Functions](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/api/gdpr-functions/): Reference guide for GDPR functions provided by Tealium for JavaScript.

- [Tealium Shopify App: Tealium configuration](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/shopify/tealium-shopify-configuration/): This article provide information about the Tealium configuration steps that should be completed before installing the Tealium Shopify app.

- [Tealium Shopify App: Configure Shopify Markets](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/shopify/configure-shopify-marketplace/): This article provides information about how to configure Shopify Markets for use with the Tealium application.

- [API Reference: Tracking Functions](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/api/tracking-functions/): Reference guide for tracking functions provided by Tealium for JavaScript.

- [Tealium Shopify App: Install the Tealium app in Shopify](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/shopify/install/): This article provides information about installing the Tealium Shopify app.

- [API Reference: Utility Functions](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/api/utility-functions/): Reference guide for utility functions provided by Tealium for JavaScript.

- [Tealium Shopify App: Data layer and events](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/shopify/data-layer-and-events/): This article provides information about the data layer variables and events tracked by the Tealium Shopify app.

- [Getting Started for Websites: Quick Start Guide for Websites](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/quick-start/): This guide covers the installation of the Tealium tag management solution for web sites. This installation requires two components: the Universal Tag …

- [Definitions: Retail data layer specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/definitions/retail/): This article provides the data layer definition for retail.

- [Definitions: Publisher data layer specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/definitions/publisher/): This article provides the data layer definition for publishers.

- [Definitions: Hotel data layer specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/definitions/hotel/): This article provides the data layer definition for hotels.

- [Definitions: Travel data layer specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/definitions/travel/): This article provides the data layer definition for travel.

- [Definitions: Financial services data layer specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/definitions/financial/): This article provides the data layer definition for financial services business, such as banking, credit cards, loans, and investment platforms.

- [Definitions: Basic video tracking data layer specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/getting-started-web/data-layer/definitions/basic-video-tracking/): This article provides the data layer definition for basic video tracking.

- [Tealium for Adobe Launch: Install Tealium for Adobe Launch](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/adobe-launch/install/): Learn about the Tealium Collect extension for Adobe Experience Platform Launch.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/install/): Learn to install Tealium for JavaScript (Web).

- [Tealium for Adobe Launch: Data layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/adobe-launch/data-layer/): Learn about the built-in (automatic) data layer variables for the Collect tag in the Adobe Launch marketplace.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/track/): Learn about the functions for tracking user activity.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Data Layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/data-layer/): Learn about the built-in variables of the Universal Data Object.

- [Tealium for Adobe Launch: Tealium Data Enrichment extension for Adobe Launch](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/adobe-launch/data-enrichment-extension/): Learn about the Tealium Data Layer Enrichment extension for Adobe Experience Platform Launch.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Universal Data Object (utag_data)](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/universal-data-object/): Learn about the Universal Data Object (`utag_data`) and the different types of web page data it makes available.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Data layer object (b)](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/data-layer-object/): Learn to use the variable alias to the data layer object.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Single-Page Applications](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/single-page-applications/): Learn to track links and events for single-page applications.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Settings](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/settings/): Learn about the available settings that adjust the behavior of `utag.js`.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Debugging](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/debugging/): Learn the basics of debugging tracking calls.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Version 4.52+ notes](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/version-4-52/): Learn about the changes in version 4.52+ and how to update to the latest version.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Version 4.50+ notes](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/version-4-50/): Learn about the changes in version 4.50+ and how to update to the latest version.

- [JavaScript (utag.js): Version 4.26 notes](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/javascript/version-4-26/): Learn about the changes in version 4.26 and how to update to the latest version.

- [Tealium Collect HTTP API v1: Endpoint Specification](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/http-api/endpoint/): This article describes how to send data to the Tealium Customer Data Hub using the HTTP API for events.

- [Tealium for AMP: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/amp/install/): Learn to install Tealium Collect for AMP sites.

- [Tealium for Angular: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/angular/install/): Learn to install the Tealium SDK for Angular.

- [Tealium for C#: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/csharp/install/): Learn to install Tealium for C#.

- [Tealium Collect for Google Tag Manager: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/google-tag-manager/install/): Learn to install Tealium Collect for Google Tag Manager.

- [Tealium for Java: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/java/install/): Learn to install Tealium for Java.

- [Tealium for Magento 1: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/magento-v1/install/): This article shows how to install Tealium in your Magento® 1 system using the Tealium iQ Tag Management Extension from the Magento Connect Extension Marketplace..

- [Tealium for Magento 2: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/magento/install/): This article shows how to install Tealium in your Magento® 2 system using the Tealium iQ Tag Management extension from the Magento Marketplace.

- [Tealium for NodeJS: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/node/install/): Learn to install Tealium for Node.js

- [Tealium for Python: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/python/install/): Learn to install Tealium for Python.

- [Tealium for Ruby: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/ruby/install/): Learn to install Tealium for Ruby.

- [Tealium for Shopify (legacy): Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/shopify-legacy/install/): This article describes how to customize your Shopify theme to use Tealium with the Tealium Shopify (legacy) integration.

- [Tealium for WordPress: Install](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/wordpress/install/): This documents explains how to install the Tealium plugin on your WordPress site.

- [Tealium Collect for Google Tag Manager: Data Layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/google-tag-manager/data-layer/): Learn about the built-in (automatic) data layer variables for the Collect tag in the Google Tag Manager marketplace.

- [Tealium Collect HTTP API v1: Data Layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/http-api/data-layer/): Learn about the data layer variables from the HTTP API library.

- [Tealium for AMP: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/amp/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for Angular: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/angular/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for C#: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/csharp/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for Java: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/java/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for NodeJS: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/node/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for Python: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/python/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for Ruby: Track](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/ruby/track/): Learn about the methods for tracking user activity.

- [Tealium for Angular: API Reference](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/angular/api/): Reference guide for classes and methods provided by Tealium for Angular.

- [Tealium for Java: API Reference](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/java/api/): Reference guide for classes methods provided by Tealium for Java.

- [Tealium for NodeJS: API Reference](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/node/api/): Reference guide for classes and methods provided by Tealium for Node.

- [Tealium for Python: API Reference](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/python/api/): Reference guide for classes and methods provided by Tealium for Python.

- [Tealium for Ruby: API Reference](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/ruby/api/): Reference guide for classes and methods provided by Tealium for Ruby.

- [Tealium for AMP: Data Layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/amp/data-layer/): Learn about the data layer variables from the AMP library.

- [Tealium for C#: Data Layer](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/csharp/data-layer/): Learn about the data layer variables from the C# library.

- [Tealium for C#: API Reference](https://docs.tealium.com/platforms/csharp/api/): Reference guide for classes and methods provided by Tealium for C#.
